綺麗な作品ですね！
DALL·E3でもそうですが、ワードの選択には気を使います。
「ロングブーツ」だと弾かれるのに、ニーハイブーツはOKとか、水着関連は特に敏感ですね。何が気に障るのか拒絶されたり通ったり、AIの心は読めません。
あと、複数人数が並んでいる時は足や手、要注意ですよね。誰の手？足３本？などいまだにエラーがあります。
そんな作品に限ってとてもいい構図だったりするのでフォトショップでいじってごまかしています。
プロンプトの長さもネックですね。主役が三つ子姉妹なので、基本の髪色やヘアースタイルの指定だけで３～４行使ってしまい、後に続くコスのリクエストに影響して思い通りに仕上がりません。

The background includes a cartoonish sun wearing sunglasses and a crab that looks suspiciously angry. The vibe is manic and colorful—a perfect snapshot of lyrical madness.

Geek Pride Day

images.alt:
Geek Pride Day is celebrated on May 25th to honor geek culture and embrace the positive aspects of being a geek. The holiday was first established in Spain in 2006 and has since spread to other countries around the world.
On Geek Pride Day, people celebrate by indulging in their geeky hobbies and interests, such as reading comics, playing video games, watching sci-fi movies, and participating in cosplay. The holiday also encourages people to embrace their individuality and take pride in their unique passions and talents.
Geek Pride Day is often associated with science fiction and fantasy culture, as well as technology and gaming. It is a day for geeks of all stripes to come together and celebrate their shared interests and enthusiasms, and to recognize the valuable contributions that geeks have made to society in fields such as science, technology, and entertainment.
